title: Wire up to_form/2 with <.form> for a single-field form
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/name_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.NameLive) that renders a one-field form for a user's name. mount/3 must build the form with to_form(%{"name" => ""}) and assign it as :form. The <.form> must bind phx-change="validate" and phx-submit="save". Use <.input field={@form[:name]} label="Name" />.
tier_rationale: Canonical one-field to_form/2 + <.form> idiom. Single pattern from Phoenix LiveView form-bindings docs.
